metadata.description: Auto-recover Claude Code sessions stuck on transient API errors

plugins.name: claude-code-api-watchdog
plugins.description: Outer-loop watchdog for unattended tmux Claude Code. Detects transient API-error stalls (429/500/502/503/529/connection-resets — not usage limits), injects Continue with exponential backoff and a 10-retry cap, escalates and stops. Pane-scrape detection with a working-spinner guard. Single file, no third-party Python deps.
